items.title: BTS’ citywide project draws global visitors, boosts tourism in Seoul
items.snippet: BTS’ citywide project “BTS The City: Arirang Seoul” wrapped up its monthlong run with a strong turnout from international visitors, highlighting the group’s impact on tourism in th...
items.description: BTS’ citywide project “BTS The City: Arirang Seoul” wrapped up its monthlong run with a strong turnout from international visitors, highlighting the group’s impact on tourism in the capital, said Big Hit Music. Launched to mark the release of BTS’ fifth LP “Arirang” and the start of its world tour of the same name, the project transformed major landmarks across the city into immersive fan experiences inspired by the group’s music and message. items.title: BTS tops Billboard global charts for fourth week, extends Hot 100 run
items.snippet: BTS remains atop major Billboard global charts for a fourth consecutive week, continuing its strong performance with its latest album "Arirang." Billboard's latest charts, dated Ap...
items.description: BTS remains atop major Billboard global charts for a fourth consecutive week, continuing its strong performance with its latest album "Arirang." Billboard's latest charts, dated April 25, show that the main track from the album, "Swim," ranked No. 1 on both the Global 200 and Global Excl. US charts for a fourth week in a row. items.title: Super Junior’s Yesung to mark 10th year as soloist with album, tour in Japan
items.snippet: Yesung of Super Junior will celebrate his 10th year as a solo singer with an album and a tour of Japan, SM Entertainment said Wednesday. He will put out his second studio album, “S...
items.description: Yesung of Super Junior will celebrate his 10th year as a solo singer with an album and a tour of Japan, SM Entertainment said Wednesday. He will put out his second studio album, “Sakihokoru Tokio Matsunowa,” on May 27. It will be his first physical release in Japan in almost 2 1/2 years, after his third single “Not Nightmare Christmas.” Ahead of the release of the physical album, he will unveil the new music on music platforms worldwide on Friday. items.title: Itzy bring out 12th EP 'Motto' in May
items.snippet: Itzy announced through its label JYP Entertainment on Wednesday that it will make a comeback on May 18 with 12th EP, “Motto.” The release comes about six months since the group's p...
items.description: Itzy announced through its label JYP Entertainment on Wednesday that it will make a comeback on May 18 with 12th EP, “Motto.” The release comes about six months since the group's previous EP “Tunnel Vision.” The eight-track EP will be released during the group's international tour. The five-member girl groupo began the tour in February and performed in Melbourne and Sydney last week. items.description: Rookie girl group Unchild stepped into the K-pop scene with a confident message of individuality, unveiling its debut digital single “We Are Unchild” at a media showcase Tuesday in central Seoul. The showcase marked the official debut of the six-member act — Heekie, Tina, Haeun, Yeeun, Ako and Evon — who introduced themselves as a team determined to break away from conventions. items.description: Cortis returned Monday with prerelease track “RedRed,” showcasing a bolder, more self-defined musical identity ahead of its upcoming second EP. Dubbed a “young creator crew,” the BigHit Music act has distinguished itself by taking part in all aspects of production — from songwriting and choreography to video direction — setting it apart from typical rookie groups. items.title: NCT Wish’s 1st album instant million-seller
items.snippet: NCT Wish’s first full-length album sold over a million copies — 1.28 million — on its release day, label SM Entertainment announced Tuesday. “Ode to Love” is the third million-sell...
items.description: NCT Wish’s first full-length album sold over a million copies — 1.28 million — on its release day, label SM Entertainment announced Tuesday. “Ode to Love” is the third million-selling set from the NCT subunit, following its second EP “poppop” and third EP “Color,” both from last year. The new album's title track climbed to No. 3 on Melon’s Top 100 after debuting atop its Hot 100. All ten tracks from the set made major Korean music charts. items.title: TXT renews record streak on Oricon chart
items.snippet: Tomorrow X Together’s eighth EP, “7th Year: A Moment of Stillness in the Thorns,” headed straight to the top of Oricon’s Weekly Album Ranking. It is the group’s 14th consecutive al...
items.description: Tomorrow X Together’s eighth EP, “7th Year: A Moment of Stillness in the Thorns,” headed straight to the top of Oricon’s Weekly Album Ranking. It is the group’s 14th consecutive album to top the Japanese chart, extending its own record for placing the most records in the No. 1 spot for an international artist, label Big Hit Music said Tuesday. items.title: Aespa announces 25-city world tour
items.snippet: Aespa will launch an international tour with 25 stops, the group's label SM Entertainment announced Tuesday. Under the title “Synk: _ae-_,” the tour will kick off Aug. 7. with two...
items.description: Aespa will launch an international tour with 25 stops, the group's label SM Entertainment announced Tuesday. Under the title “Synk: _ae-_,” the tour will kick off Aug. 7. with two shows in Seoul. After a visit to Taipei, the group will fly around Latin and North America for the remainder of 2026. In January next year, aespa will tour Europe showcasing new material from its second album, “Lemonade,” which will be released on May 29. items.title: BTS stays among top 10 on Billboard’s Hot 100
items.snippet: BTS is spending its fourth week on Billboard’s Hot 100 at No. 10 with “Swim,” according to the chart preview published Tuesday. The main track from the group's fifth studio album “...
items.description: BTS is spending its fourth week on Billboard’s Hot 100 at No. 10 with “Swim,” according to the chart preview published Tuesday. The main track from the group's fifth studio album “Arirang” fell five rungs from the previous week, after having made a chart-topping debut on the rankings. It was the band’s seventh song overall to occupy the top spot on the main songs chart and sixth to debut at the top. The single has charted four weeks at No. 1 on both the Billboard Global 200 and Billboard Global

items.title: Aespa to return with second LP ‘Lemonade’ on May 29
items.snippet: Aespa is set to return with its second full-length album, titled “Lemonade,” on May 29, SM Entertainment said Monday. The upcoming album will feature 10 tracks spanning various gen...
items.description: Aespa is set to return with its second full-length album, titled “Lemonade,” on May 29, SM Entertainment said Monday. The upcoming album will feature 10 tracks spanning various genres, offering a broader look at the group’s musical spectrum. Known for its distinctive universe-driven concept, Aespa is expected to further expand its storytelling while showcasing a more mature sound through the new release. items.title: NCT Wish closes tour with youthful energy, opens door to next chapter
items.snippet: Dressed in all white and rising from the center of a star-shaped stage, NCT Wish opened the final night of its “Into the Wish: Our Wish” encore concert at Kspo Dome in southern Seo...
items.description: Dressed in all white and rising from the center of a star-shaped stage, NCT Wish opened the final night of its “Into the Wish: Our Wish” encore concert at Kspo Dome in southern Seoul on Sunday with the clean, bright visual that has come to define the group. Beyond the polished staging, the night carried a deeper meaning: the finale of a six-month tour and the threshold of a new era, coming just a day before the release of its first album, “Ode to Love.” While the show looked back on the journey

items.title: TXT logs 1.8m in first-week sales
items.snippet: Tomorrow X Together’s eighth EP “7th Year: A Moment of Stillness in the Thorns” sold more than 1.8 million units in its first week, said label Big Hit Music Monday, citing a local...
items.description: Tomorrow X Together’s eighth EP “7th Year: A Moment of Stillness in the Thorns” sold more than 1.8 million units in its first week, said label Big Hit Music Monday, citing a local tally. The mini album logged 1 million sales on the day of release, becoming its seventh consecutive album to do so. The six-track endeavor debuted at the top of Oricon’s Daily Album Ranking and reclaimed the top spot on Friday. items.title: BTS to take 'The City' project to Las Vegas and Busan
items.snippet: K-pop supergroup BTS' large-scale cultural program "The City" will return to Las Vegas next month and Busan in June to celebrate the group's stops there for the ongoing world tour,...
items.description: K-pop supergroup BTS' large-scale cultural program "The City" will return to Las Vegas next month and Busan in June to celebrate the group's stops there for the ongoing world tour, the group's agency, BigHit Music, said Monday. "The City" project debuted during the band's "Permission to Dance on Stage" tour in Las Vegas in 2022 to boost the festive mood, illuminating the city's major landmarks in purple, the signature color of its global fandom, ARMY. items.title: Seventeen garners 100m Spotify streams with ‘Thunder’
items.snippet: Seventeen's “Thunder” reached 100 million plays on Spotify on Saturday, agency Pledis Entertainment said Monday. It is the group’s 20th song to reach the 100 million mark, includin...
items.description: Seventeen's “Thunder” reached 100 million plays on Spotify on Saturday, agency Pledis Entertainment said Monday. It is the group’s 20th song to reach the 100 million mark, including singles from its subunits. The electronic dance tune is the lead single from fifth full album “Happy Burstday,” which was released in May 2025. items.title: BTS slips to No. 3 on Billboard 200 after 3-week reign
items.snippet: BTS' fifth studio album “Arirang” slid to No. 3 on Billboard 200, after staying atop the main albums chart for three weeks in a row, according to the chart preview published Monday...
items.description: BTS' fifth studio album “Arirang” slid to No. 3 on Billboard 200, after staying atop the main albums chart for three weeks in a row, according to the chart preview published Monday. The LP has dominated Spotify’s Weekly Top Albums Global for four consecutive weeks with the main track “Swim” on its Weekly Top Songs Global. On the UK’s Official Albums Top 100, the 14-track set ranked No. 5 in its fourth week, and the single sits at No. 25 on its Singles Top 100. Meanwhile, the group held live show

items.title: BTS at Tokyo Dome
items.snippet: BTS wrapped up their “BTS World Tour ‘ARIRANG’ IN TOKYO” concerts at Tokyo Dome in Japan on April 17-18, its agency Big Hit Entertainment announced Sunday. The performances marked...
items.description: BTS wrapped up their “BTS World Tour ‘ARIRANG’ IN TOKYO” concerts at Tokyo Dome in Japan on April 17-18, its agency Big Hit Entertainment announced Sunday. The performances marked the group’s return to Tokyo Dome after seven years and five months, following their “BTS World Tour Love Yourself ~Japan Edition~” shows in November 2018.
